top_signals.title: Gold Bars, Cash Mark Fall of Indonesia’s Top Graft Hunter
top_signals.summary: Rows of gold bars, stacks of US and Singapore dollars and seven suitcases found inside a locked safe have become the defining images of one of the biggest scandals to hit Indonesia’s law-enforcement establishment in years.

top_signals.title: New U-Boot flaws could enable stealthy firmware attacks
top_signals.summary: Six vulnerabilities in the widely used U-Boot bootloader have been discovered that could allow attackers to execute malicious code during device boot, potentially enabling stealthy firmware attacks that compromise security protections and install persistent malware. [...]

alerts.title: Housing bill that includes a CBDC ban passed into law without Trump’s signature
